# unifi_wifi_broadcast (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi WiFi broadcast by `id` or `name` within a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing WiFi broadcast by name.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

data "unifi_wifi_broadcast" "staff" {
  site_id = data.unifi_site.main.id
  name    = "staff"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String)

### Optional

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `advertise_device_name` (Boolean)
- `arp_proxy_enabled` (Boolean)
- `band_steering_enabled` (Boolean)
- `broadcasting_device_filter` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--broadcasting_device_filter))
- `broadcasting_frequencies_ghz` (Set of Number)
- `bss_transition_enabled` (Boolean)
- `client_isolation_enabled` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `hide_name` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `multicast_to_unicast_conversion_enabled` (Boolean)
- `network` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network))
- `security_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_configuration))
- `type` (String)
- `uapsd_enabled` (Boolean)

- `type` (String)

- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `group_rekey_interval_seconds` (Number)

- `pmf_mode` (String)
- `sae_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_configuration--sae_configuration))
